allow: Bash(cd /c/Users/user/project/664deaeb/public && grep -oE 'var\\\(--[a-z0-9-]+\\\)' style.css | sort -u | sed 's/var\(--//;s/\)//' > /tmp/used.txt && grep -oE '^\\s*--[a-z0-9-]+:' style.css | sed 's/[: ]//g;s/--//' | sort -u > /tmp/defined.txt && echo "=== USED but NOT DEFINED ===" && comm -23 /tmp/used.txt /tmp/defined.txt)
